messages.content: Add an FAQ section with 4 common questions people ask before starting a vending machine business.

context.title: Coffee vending for offices
context.metaDescription: Coffee vending machines for modern workplaces.

input.title: Starting a Vending Machine Business: Frequently Asked Questions

faqItems.question: How much space and power does a standard vending machine require?
faqItems.answer: Requirements can vary by model, but most standard vending machines require a standard electrical outlet and a level footprint of about one square metre with adequate ventilation clearance. It is best to verify exact power draws and spatial clearance specs with the manufacturer before installation.

faqItems.question: How do I secure high-traffic locations for my machines?
faqItems.answer: Securing locations typically involves researching busy local spaces—such as workplaces, transport hubs, or waiting rooms—and presenting the benefits of convenience to the property owner. Many operators establish written agreements or commission structures to formalise the placement.

Operating a vending business requires a consistent schedule for restocking inventory, cleaning the machines, and testing payment systems. Depending on usage levels, machines might need visiting weekly or even daily to maintain fresh stock and clean presentation.
faqItems.question: What are the typical ongoing maintenance and restocking responsibilities?
Which payment options should I offer on new vending machines?
faqItems.answer: Modern buyers increasingly expect contactless payment options, including credit cards, debit cards, and mobile wallet apps. Offering a combination of traditional cash systems and digital card readers can help maximise transaction volumes and accommodate all customer preferences.

input.body: Find answers to the most common questions entrepreneurs ask when planning and launching a new vending machine operation.
